intent: 1BR / 1 bath squarish LDK smoke test, no carport. 11x11 lot gives a 7x7 envelope = 49 m2 floor -- the LDK sibling of 1s_1br_sq_side_split_bath_gr, which stays compact-only (min is always the gr topology's job). Separate living/dining/kitchen instead of a counter-divider great_room; feasible 10x10-12x12, this is the smaller (med) end of that range.
must_haves: bath door opens into kitchen, not living
separate living, dining, and kitchen rooms
